analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet highlights the strength and importance of EU–US trade relations, noting they form the biggest economic relationship globally and that 47 US states trade more with the EU than with China. Evaluation: EU1 (EU successful story) – Supported indirectly, as portraying the EU as a major, reliable economic partner in the largest global trade relationship suggests success and effectiveness. EU2 (EU united) – Not explicitly addressed; no mention of internal EU unity or agreement. EU3 (EU useful for its citizens) – Not focused on internal benefits to EU citizens; the emphasis is on transatlantic trade statistics and partnership. EU4 (EU avant-garde political actor) – Not about pioneering regulation or leadership in future challenges. EU5 (EU global champion of fair causes) – Not discussed. EU6 (EU contributes to a better world) – Partially aligned insofar as it underscores international cooperation and partnership, framing the EU as a key global economic partner; however, the tweet is primarily economic, not normative. Still, it contributes to the image of the EU fostering global cooperation and prosperity. Conclusion: The tweet promotes EU1 clearly and EU6 to a reasonable extent.
